title: Senior Teacher - Manya Group South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Manya Group South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manya Group South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Manya Group South Asia Partners:
Manya Group South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manya Group South Asia Partners!
